objective:
Objectif: Génère un nouveau style de trading crypto basé sur l'analyse d'ADX et Aroon avec une combinaison de Bollinger Bands, MACD et EMA pour le mean reversion dans les paires BTC/USD qui ont des variations importantes. Utilise la volatilité implicite pour gating afin d'éviter les faux signaux et utilise un angle plus prometteur (curated) pour choisir l'angle de 45° comme coupure-hors-sentiers battus. Fait une entrée avec l'ADX >20, Aroon up > 70%, Bollinger Bands à son niveau bas et MACD en croix haute et évalue les sorties sur un stop loss (SL) de 3% sous le niveau minimum de la volatilité implicite pour une TP (Take Profit) à 1%.

Trouve des paires rares d'indicateurs, utilise des comportements aleatoires et propose une hypothese testable.

iterations.hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy has been designed to trade crypto pairs where there are significant price fluctuations. It uses ADX, Aroon, Bollinger Bands, MACD and EMA for mean reversion in the BTC/USD pair. The entry is done with an ADX>20, Aroon up > 70%, Bollinger Bands at their low level and MACD cross high. A stop loss of 3% below the implied volatility minimum level is set as a take profit target of 1%. Weaknesses include potential for false signals due to use of implied volatility gate and mediocre performance with low Sharpe ratio.
[Backup plan] 1. To address weaknesses, introduce more filters such as looking at other indicators like RSI or volume data before entering trades.2. In case the strategy results in negative return, focus on improving ADX and Aroon criteria to increase accuracy of signals generated3. To improve performance with low Sharpe ratio, adjust stop loss level to a higher value (e.g., 5%) while maintaining same take profit target4. If all else fails, consider trying other trading strategies that may better suit the market conditions or diversifying into different assets.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on ADX and Aroon indicators along with Bollinger Bands, MACD and EMA for mean reversion in the BTC/USD pairs that have significant variations. The use of implied volatility to gate signals and a promising angle (45°) as stop-loss and take profit levels are defined. However, there's room for improvement such as refining the entry conditions or finding better alternatives among indicators.
[Backup plan] If the current one fails, we could: 1. Consider other crypto pairs or markets; 2. Test sentiment analysis indicators alongside technical ones like ADX; 3. Explore alternative strategies such as mean reversion with Garch model and Bollinger Bands parameters adjustments.
